name: Kingston National Bank
description_short: Kingston National Bank is a community bank offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services with over a century of local history and FDIC protection.
description_long:
Kingston National Bank has operated as a trusted community financial institution for more than a century, establishing itself as a dependable banking partner with deep local roots. The bank emphasizes its commitment to friendly, personalized service while modernizing its offerings to meet contemporary banking needs. Kingston National Bank serves both personal and business customers through multiple locations with standard banking hours and after-hours support options.

The bank provides a comprehensive range of financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, personal loans, business accounts, business loans, agricultural loans, and certificate of deposit (CD) products. Their checking accounts are powered by BaZing, offering perks such as cell phone protection, shopping discounts, and roadside assistance. Kingston emphasizes digital banking accessibility through online banking and mobile banking platforms, allowing customers to check balances, transfer funds, and pay bills remotely. They also provide business-specific online banking, business card services, and specialized agricultural lending.

Kingston National Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community presence combined with modern digital services. The bank actively promotes educational resources including an Education Center, financial calculators, and budgeting tools. They've recently introduced after-hours debit card support (877-755-3163) for lost or stolen cards and account questions, recognizing customer needs outside standard banking hours. The bank is FDIC insured and an Equal Housing Lender, providing standard consumer protections.

As a traditional community bank, Kingston National Bank is best suited for customers seeking personal banking relationships with local branch access rather than those prioritizing cutting-edge fintech features or premium wealth management services. The website provides limited detail on specific interest rates, fees, minimum balances, or loan terms, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for detailed product information. The bank's focus on community and personal service may appeal to customers who value in-person banking relationships, though the transition away from telephone banking suggests some digital-first movement. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with BaZing perks (cell phone protection, shopping discounts, roadside assistance)
Personal savings accounts and club accounts for specific savings goals
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) for long-term savings
Online and mobile banking with balance checking, fund transfers, and bill pay
Business loans and lines of credit
After-hours debit card support (lost/stolen card reporting and account questions)
Financial education resources and budgeting calculators
pros: FDIC insured with over 100 years of established community banking history
BaZing-powered checking accounts include cell phone protection, shopping discounts, and roadside assistance
After-hours debit card support available at 877-755-3163 for lost/stolen cards outside banking hours
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile app, online banking, and bill pay functionality
Multiple account types including personal checking, savings, CDs, business accounts, and agricultural loans
Education Center with financial calculators and budgeting resources available on website
Equal Housing Lender with commitment to fair lending practices
cons: Website provides no specific information on interest rates, APYs, fees, or minimum balance requirements
Limited details on loan terms, rates, or qualification requirements for personal or business loans
Telephone banking service has been discontinued, forcing customers to use online/mobile platforms or visit branches
No information about online account opening or whether accounts can be opened remotely
Website lacks transparency on business hours for most locations—customers must visit Locations & Hours page
best_for: Community-focused customers seeking personal banking relationships with local branch access
Small business owners needing agricultural loans or specialized business credit products
Customers who value established banking institutions with FDIC protection and long local history
Savers seeking CD products or specialized savings accounts like club accounts for specific goals
diagnosis: Kingston National Bank is best for customers seeking traditional community banking with local branch access, FDIC protection, and personalized service, particularly small business owners and agricultural borrowers. The main caveat is that the website lacks specific information on rates, fees, and terms, requiring direct contact with the bank for detailed product pricing and qualification details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
